question: Do any other adults live in your home?
textAreaLabel: Give details about the other adults living in your home
textAreaHintText: You should include details about how many adults live in your home, their relationship to you, as well as anything else you think the court should know about them

errors.confirmOtherAdults: Select if any other adults live in your home
errors.otherAdultsDetails: Give details about the other adults living in your home
errors.otherAdultsDetailsInvalidCharacters: Give details about the other adults living in your home must only include letters a to z, and special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
